additional_metadata.note: Delivered in Chinese; co-organized with AWS.

events.agenda: A Coalesce 2024 recap, best practices for Amazon Redshift with dbt, dbt data quality testing, and an introduction to the semantic layer with dbt.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, focused on practical sharing of using dbt Core/dbt Cloud, co-organized with AWS to explore open source data best practices.
events.raw_text:
Tue, Nov 12, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM CET (7:00 PM - 9:00 PM Shanghai time)

Online event

China dbt Meetup (Virtual, in Chinese)

Agenda:
7:05 - Recap of Coalesce 2024 Keynote: Innovating with dbt (Tristan Handy)
7:30 - Best Practices for Using Amazon Redshift and dbt (Wenhui Yang)
8:00 - Catch Data Issues with dbt! Data Quality Checks with dbt test (Sally)
8:30 - Semantic Layer: What it is and how to adopt it with dbt (Xin Zhang)

talks.description: dbt Labs co-founder and CEO recaps the Coalesce 2024 keynote, unveiling his vision for the analytics development lifecycle.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #1:Tristan Handy. Recap of Coalesce 2024 Keynote: Innovating with dbt
talks.title: Recap of Coalesce 2024 Keynote: Innovating with dbt

talks.description: How to efficiently combine Amazon Redshift and dbt to build stable, optimized data pipelines, covering loading, transformation, query performance, and data governance.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #2: Wenhui Yang. Practices for Using Amazon Redshift and dbt
talks.title: Practices for Using Amazon Redshift and dbt

talks.description: A demonstration of how to conduct data quality testing in dbt by making and testing assertions about data.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #3: Sally. Catch Data Issues with dbt! Data Quality Checks with dbt test
talks.title: Catch Data Issues with dbt! Data Quality Checks with dbt test

talks.description: What the data semantic layer is and how to build one using dbt to create an abstraction layer between data sources and end users.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 🗣️Presentation #4:Xin Zhang. Semantic Layer: What it is and how to adopt it with dbt
talks.title: Semantic Layer: What it is and how to adopt it with dbt
